title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Enter Into a Collective Negotiated Agreement (CNA) with the Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños- Laguna (AMELBA-UNA), Inc., the Organized and Existing Employee?s Association of the Municipal Government and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 12/21/2020)
